text_blocks.text: Tamara de Lempicka was a famous
artist born in Warsaw. She was born Maria
Gorska in Warsaw to wealthy parents and in 1916
married a Polish lawyer Tadeusz Lempicki. Better
than anyone else she represented the Art Deco
style in painting and art. Nathan Alterman, the
Israeli poet, was born in Warsaw, as was Moshe
Vilenski, the Israeli composer, lyricist, and pianist,
who studied music at the Warsaw Conservatory.
Warsaw was the beloved city of Isaac Bashevis
Singer, which he described in many of his novels:
Warsaw has just now been destroyed. No one will
ever see the Warsaw I knew. Let me just write
about it. Let this Warsaw not disappear forever, he
